changes: Purify: Resilience will now be granted unconditionally.
Holy Sheltron: The damage reduction of Knight's Resolve has been increased from 15% to 20%.
Riddle of Earth: The duration of Earth Resonance has been reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Goka Mekkyaku: Area of effect radius has been increased from 5 to 6 yalms.
Tenebrae Lemurum: The duration of Enshrouded has been increased from 15 to 20 seconds.
Silent Nocturne: Recast time has been increased from 20 to 30 seconds.
Empyreal Arrow: Potency has been reduced from 4,000 to 3,000.
The Warden's Paean: Recast time has been reduced from 30 to 25 seconds; Barrier duration has been reduced from 10 to 8 seconds.
Blast Arrow: Potency has been increased from 8,000 to 10,000.
Honing Ovation: Attack and barrier potency granted by each stack of Acclaim has been increased from 1,000/2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000 to 2,000/3,000/4,000/5,000/6,000.
Maximum HP: Maximum HP has been raised from 48,000 to 49,500.
Miracle of Nature: Recast time has been increased from 30 to 45 seconds.
Gunbreaker and Astrologian damage modifiers adjusted from 0% to -5%.
Dragoon and Samurai damage modifiers adjusted from 0% to -10%.
Dark Knight and Summoner damage modifiers adjusted from -10% to -15%.
A +15 second modifier has been applied to the limit gauge fill rate for Dark Knight, Gunbreaker, and Summoner.

new_content.name: The Gilded Araya
new_content.description: A new trial added to the game.

new_content.name: Instance System
new_content.description: Multiple instances implemented for Old Sharlayan to prevent server congestion.

housing.name: Imitation Magitek Repair Station (Wall Unit)
housing.description: Appearing as though it came straight from a Garlean castrum, one would be forgiven for attempting to maintain magitek armor with this repair station. * Not an actual repair station; cannot be used in the maintenance of magitek armor.

housing.name: Imitation Magitek Repair Station (Floor Unit)
housing.description: Appearing as though it came straight from a Garlean castrum, one would be forgiven for attempting to maintain magitek armor with this repair station. * Not an actual repair station; cannot be used in the maintenance of magitek armor.

housing.name: Labyrinthos Grape Lamppost
housing.description: Seeking to make grapes more transportable, a researcher at Meryall Agronomics is rumored to have produced a variety that grew in blocky clusters. Although complaints that they looked unappetizing led to a new strain with rounder edges, the original was regarded fondly by some, and so it was immortalized in the form of this lamppost.

housing.name: Nursery Canopy
housing.description: Lounge like a highborn tot with this elegant and cozy nursery canopy.

housing.name: Korpokkur Moss Ball
housing.description: So lifelike is this ornamental moss ball, it looks as though it could up and walk off at any moment, miniature tree and all.

housing.name: Hyper Hustle Trophy
housing.description: A trophy that represents the power of teamwork, friendly competition, shared cuisine, hope, dreams, purpose...and batteries.
